mapper.select: SELECT sm.`id`, sm.`name`, sm.`parent_id` AS pid FROM `mk_sys_menu` AS sm LEFT JOIN `mk_sys_role_menu` AS srm ON sm.`id` = srm.`menu_id` LEFT JOIN `mk_sys_user_role` AS sr ON srm.`role_id` = sr.`role_id` WHERE sm.`is_delete` = 0 And sm.`keep_alive` = 0 AND sm.`type` IN (-1, 0, 1) AND sr.`user_id` = #{sysUserId} GROUP BY sm.`id` ORDER BY sm.`id`
